prose:
Built 3-D coordinates for dimethyl sulfoxide (DMSO) with the chemkit build-from-smiles skill.

• Name resolved via PubChem (CID 679) to isomeric SMILES “CS(=O)C”.
• Geometry embedded with Open Babel `--gen3d` (build-from-smiles skill).
• Output XYZ written to /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/build-validation/DMSO/20260619-134509_DMSO_build/agent_call_01.xyz (path is local to the run directory).

The resulting molecule contains 10 atoms (formula C₂H₆OS).

No warnings were raised; integrity check status: trustworthy.
